name: OnTcpSend
title: OnTcpSend
syntax: void OnTcpSend( dword socket, long result, char buffer[], dword size);
description: If the CAPL program implements this callback it is called when the data from the stack have been processed but not yet placed on the bus. The information is first displayed in the CANoe Trace Window when it has physically been sent.

parameters.name: socket
parameters.description: The socket handle or socket object.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: The result code of the asynchronous operation. If the operation completed successfully the value is 0. Otherwise the value is an error code.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The buffer provided with the send operation.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
